name: hewg_scope
description: Show the blast radius of a function — its callers, callees, and their declared effects. Use this to understand which functions will be affected by a change and what effect boundaries you need to respect.

symbol.description: The function name to query. Accepts bare names (e.g. 'fetchWeather'), file-qualified names ('src/api/client.ts:fetchWeather'), or module-qualified names ('api/client::fetchWeather').

depth.description: Maximum traversal depth for callers and callees. Default: 5.
